title: How the Iran war has stoked competition between India and China for Russian oil
summary_full: As the Iran war drags on and the Strait of Hormuz stays shut, India and China are increasingly competing against each other for shrinking crude oil supplies.
summary_public: As the Iran war drags on and the Strait of Hormuz stays shut, India and China are increasingly competing against each other for shrinking crude oil supplies.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war has stoked competition between India and China for Russian oil
